title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Luffy, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kizaru, Unknown person #3 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Admiral Kizaru has begun his incursion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get Ready! The enemy won't take this lying down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't let them use their lasers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's a fight you want, I'll give you one!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: The Vice Admirals are touching down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Marines and robo- beasts at the coast...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Already? But Sentomaru is waiting for them with a squadron of Pacific under his command...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It should be clear that the island's defenses are high imperable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so they sent that guy ahead to take out the deterrent?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't that Kizaru?! Stussy was right, they sent in an Admiral!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems those dark memories from Sabaody have come back to haunt us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They've already started fighting down there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Sentomaru! Asking you to face him is too cruel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll understand if you choose to Flee!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
